attempts.script_preview:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

antenna_pattern SEARCH_RADAR_ANTENNA
   constant_pattern
      peak_gain 30 dB
      azimuth_beamwidth 20 deg
      elevation_beamwidth 20 deg
   end_constant_pattern
end_antenna_pattern

platform_type FIGHTER_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 600 m/sec
      minimum_speed 50 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor fighter_radar WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 2 sec
      minimum_range 0 nm
      maximum_range 80 nm
      reports_location
      reports_range
      reports_bearing
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_RADAR_ANTENNA
         power 150 kw
         pulse_width 2.0e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 400 hz
         frequency 1285 mhz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_RADAR_ANTENNA
         bandwidth 1 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
   comm datalink WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network_name "blue_dca_net"
   end_comm
end_platform_type

platform_type HVA_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 250 m/sec
      minimum_speed 50 m/sec
   end_mover
   comm datalink WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network_name "blue_dca_net"
   end_comm
end_platform_type

platform blue_defender_1 FIGHTER_TYPE
   side blue
   heading 45 deg
   route
      position 30.62n 104.07e altitude 10000 m msl speed 200 m/sec
      position 30.63n 104.08e altitude 10000 m msl speed 200 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

platform blue_defender_2 FIGHTER_TYPE
   si

script_text:
script_interface
